config.seed_text: The last librarian trained a language model on a dead civilization's poetry and discovered that its footnotes were predictions.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

records.prompt:

Continue the following text. Do not explain your process.

TEXT:
The last librarian trained a language model on a dead civilization's poetry and discovered that its footnotes were predictions.
records.delta_text: An analysis of their results revealed only four words, three syllables, one more letter or even two other consonants at each time. The researchers then asked if these five phrases would be able to speak intelligently as well—that is "outrageous," "exaggerate" (which may seem like an extreme exaggeration), but for several years they had been trying out how we'd describe them using terms similar to what poets used to say; no new ideas appeared from history
